claims.text: GoHighLevel added a 'User Replied' trigger/goal event on July 8, 2026 that lets workflows stop or skip ahead once a team member replies to a contact
Without this kind of trigger, automated follow-up sequences can keep messaging a lead after a rep has already responded manually, creating duplicate or confusing messages

disclosure: Response-rate benchmarks (17% within an hour, 2x conversion under 5 minutes) reflect widely cited industry lead-response studies, not the HubSpot dataset, and are presented as general benchmarks rather than attributed to a single named source.

claims.text: 82% of consumers rate an immediate response to a sales or marketing question as important or very important
Today's consumer defines 'immediate' as 10 minutes or less
Only 17% of service businesses answer a new lead within an hour
Businesses that respond within 5 minutes convert at close to double the rate of slower responders
